mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEWNO, R.USERNO, R.COMMENTA, R.CREATEDAT, R.CONTENTTYPE, R.CONTENTNO, M.USERNAME AS USERNAME FROM REVIEW R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.USERNO = M.USERNO WHERE R.CONTENTNO = #{contentNo} ORDER BY R.CREATEDAT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW (REVIEWNO, USERNO, COMMENTA, CREATEDAT, CONTENTTYPE, CONTENTNO) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{userNo}, #{commentA}, SYSDATE, #{contentType}, #{contentNo})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM REVIEW WHERE REVIEWNO = #{reviewNo} AND USERNO = #{userNo}
